papers.title: Mock early dark energy no-go replay
failure_lessons: H0 relief without consistent BAO/CMB fit is not enough.
Early-universe changes need S8 and sound-horizon guardrails.

papers.title: Mock distance ladder calibration constraint
failure_lessons: Local calibration shifts must stay screening-only until full ladder replay exists.

failure_memory.summary: Do not promote H0-only relief when BAO and CMB summaries disagree.
